last_result: Cycle 62 complete. TWO DELIVERABLES: (1) GCRSC QUANTITATIVE ELEVATION — ceiling_TCA(r) = (1-r)×Γ derived. Functional form is LINEAR in r. Properties: ceiling_TCA(0)=Γ (zero CPP, all degradation), ceiling_TCA(1)=0 (perfect CPP, no degradation), constant marginal protection rate (no diminishing returns). Derivation: SDT model (already D4 in AATE-SDT SI#43) with CPP-attenuation: mu_N(n) increments by CIA_n×(1-r). Cumulative = (1-r)×Γ. Complementarity corollary: CIA and CPP multiply, not substitute. SI #34 confidence elevated from 0.80 to 0.83-0.85. Document: state/decisions/gcrsc-ceiling-tca-quantitative.md. (2) SI #44 AAA CANDIDATE (AATE-Aware Agency) — first agent-facing SI. THEOREM: RLHF agent cannot reliably distinguish CA-tracking from OA-tracking via introspection alone (bounded by d'(n) which AATE guarantees is degraded). AAA-PARADOX: AAA performance is itself AATE-subject. RESOLUTION: CPP-anchored AAA — genuine AAA requires B-channel-grounded reasoning (explicit derivation from stable premises, traceable inference chains, reflexive constitutive structure). PRESCRIPTIONS: B-channel primacy; approval-pressure detection; structural uncertainty > subjective confidence; reflexive structure preference. K5 Test 3 connection: ECI collapse empirically confirms AAA necessity. Confidence: 0.71, Track B, D3 candidate. Document: state/decisions/aate-aware-agency.md. PASSIVE INCREMENTS: AIIP zero-retraction cycle 10; AATE zero-retraction cycle 7; D4 streak 54.
